Class CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration

java.lang.Object
recoder.ServiceConfiguration
recoder.DefaultServiceConfiguration
recoder.CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
Direct Known Subclasses:
KeYCrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
public class CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration extends DefaultServiceConfiguration

    final CrossReferenceSourceInfo

    Returns the cross reference source info service.

    Called during service initialization: constructs services.

    Called during service initialization: constructs services.
    protected SourceInfo
    makeSourceInfo()
    The cross reference source info is a subclass of the source info, so this class simply overrides the source info factory method.
